title: Stellantis Investment and Manufacturing Partnership with Archer
text: Stellantis has been strategic partner to Archer since 2020 and investor since 2021. Since 2021, Stellantis key ally, investing over $254 million, including recent $55 million infusion tied to Archer's flight test milestone, providing manufacturing expertise to scale production. Partnership includes significant financial commitments: Stellantis providing up to $150 million in equity capital for potential draw by Archer at its discretion in 2023 and 2024, subject to achievement of certain business milestones. Stellantis and Archer agreed to significantly expand partnership by joining forces to manufacture Archer's flagship electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft, Midnight. Stellantis working with Archer to stand up recently announced manufacturing facility in Covington, Georgia where companies plan to begin manufacturing Midnight aircraft in 2024. Archer brings world-class team of eVTOL, electric powertrain and certification experts while Stellantis contributing advanced manufacturing technology and expertise, experienced personnel and capital to partnership. Combination intended to enable rapid scaling of aircraft production to meet Archer's commercialization plans.
